raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I purchased a round trip airline ticket through XXXX XXXX. I was charged the correct amount for the ticket itself, which was {$11.00}. I upgraded my ticket to extra legroom both ways. This incurred a correct charge of {$160.00} for the flight to XXXX and a correct charge of {$120.00} for the return trip to XXXX. These charges should have totaled {$300.00}. 
That same day, I was erroneously charged the {$160.00} and the {$120.00} an additional 16 times each, totaling {$4700.00} I contacted my CC company XXXX XXXX XXXX Barclays Bank ) and explained this to them. They told me I had to contact XXXX XXXX to have the charges refunded. 
I did this on XX/XX/XXXX and was refunded only {$2500.00}. I contacted them again on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX. They stated they could see the charges and I would be refunded the rest. This has not happened and I am still owed {$2100.00}.
